title: stellaria cherleriae var. polyantha
intro: Stellaria cherleriae var. polyantha, also known as Himalayan starwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae, native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stellaria cherleriae var. polyantha include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and alleviating digestive problems. It can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
